creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Turns out this was just another incarnation of the dr^Hthreaded 
perl problem.  Although threaded perl support has been disabled in 
RELENG_4, the originator is using RELENG_4_3, which still offers 
this breakage on a silver platter. :-( 

The originator suggested that the ports system might alert users 
to the use of a broken perl.  While I like the idea, I don't have 
time for it and have asked the originator to take it up with the 
ports team.
